description: A retailer claims they were short-shipped on a recent order (i.e., they received fewer items than they were billed for).

nodes.task_description: Receive the short shipment claim from the retailer.
Review the original pick list and the packing video for the order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reviews the evidence and confirms that the item was indeed short-packed.

nodes.task_description: Issue a credit to the retailer for the missing item.
Provide feedback to the warehouse team to prevent future errors.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a report to the warehouse manager about the picking error.
